hero.title: Your friend with a boat.
hero.subtitle: Private and shared canal cruises through the real Amsterdam. No Heineken hats. No loudspeakers. Just good vibes and hidden gems.

about.label: who we are
about.title: Started with one boat and a dream.
about.body: Off Course was born from one feeling: being on the water feels like home. We're Jannah & Beer, and we wanted to share the real Amsterdam — not the tourist version. Now we take people to the spots only locals know, on electric boats that are basically floating living rooms.
about.body2: No tour guide vibes. No dress code. No nonsense. We'll handle the rest.

search.title: Find your perfect cruise
search.noResults: No cruises available for this date. Try another day?
